use_cases: Displaying frequently asked questions on websites with collapsible answers
Creating expandable help documentation sections for support pages
Building terms of service or privacy policy sections with hidden details
Organizing product feature explanations in a compact, user-controlled format
Structuring knowledge base content with categorized accordion sections
ai_summary: A flexible FAQ accordion component built with Radix UI and styled using Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority. Features multiple visual variants (default, ghost, outline) and sizes (sm, default, lg), with built-in keyboard accessibility and focus ring states. Uses CSS variables for theming consistency and includes a ChevronDown icon for expand/collapse indicators. Ideal for displaying FAQ content, help documentation, or any collapsible information sections on websites.
